item.title: Why Israeli Hackers Just Burned $90M of Crypto
item.author: Seytonic
item.content:encoded:

0:00 Intro 0:16 Israeli Hackers Just Burned $90M of Crypto 2:45 DeleteMe (ad) 3:47 FED: Archetyp BUSTED 6:18 FED: GCHQ Intern Jailed 7:39 FED: 11 Year old Cyber Criminals 8:51 Sneaky Discord Hack
Sources: https://therecord.media/pro-israel-hackers-claim-attack-on-iranian-bank
